texto: Witchcraft is the attempt to gain special knowledge or power outside God. What do we mean by "special?" We mean power or knowledge that is not found or allowed by God in the natural order.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Thiessen que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Witchcraft is the attempt to gain special knowledge or power outside God. What do we mean by "spe…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, christianity, special, com foco em reflexao.
